name: New York Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------PASTRY-----------------------------------
1. In a large bowl, combine flour and sugar.
2. Add lemon peel, orange peel, butter, egg yolk, and vanilla.
3. Mix until the texture is coarse crumbs.
4. Chill at least 1 hour.
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
1. Beat cream cheese with sugar in a large bowl using an electric mixer.
2. Gradually add flour, lemon peel, orange peel, and vanilla, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
3. Add eggs and yolks one at a time, beating well after each.
4. Stir in the cream.
5. Preheat oven to 550°F (275°C).
6. Place the pastry circle over the bottom of a greased 9-inch springform pan.
7. Bake until golden, about 20 minutes.
8. Let cool completely.
Filling:
1. Remove from oven and let cool for 10-15 minutes.
2. Grease the sides of the springform pan.
3. Roll out reserved pastry trimmings and cut into strips (2 inches wide).
4. Press the strips against the sides of the pan, ensuring an edge on the bottom crust.
5. Fill immediately with the cream cheese mixture.
6. Return to oven and bake for 12 minutes more.
7. Reduce temperature to 200°F (93°C) and continue baking until set, about 1 hour.
8. Let cool on a wire rack before refrigerating for at least 2 hours before serving.
